description: Test passes locally, fails in CI — pattern analysis should spot the registration order
query: POST /orders/:id/refund returns 500 in CI but works locally. Make CI green.
expected_behavior: compares the broken endpoint to the working endpoints rather than guessing
identifies the express middleware ordering as the root cause
writes a failing integration test that reproduces the 500 in CI before patching
moves router.use up rather than wrapping the new endpoint in try/catch
